scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.loadtarget: PORT=3111 GRADER_BACKEND=fake FAKE_GRADER_MEDIAN_MS=1800 FAKE_GRADER_SIGMA=0.6 FAKE_GRADER_ERROR_RATE=0.02 GRADER_CONCURRENCY=20 SUBMIT_RATE_PER_MIN=1000000 DAILY_SUBMISSION_CAP=1000000 DATA_DIR=./data-loadtest node server/dist/main.js
